For Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DEVINE COMMUNICATIONS, INCORPORATED'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction Against Telwise Corporation, Klicktrade, Inc. and Filkonek Corporation.
APPEARANCES: Mark Hooshmand, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group 835-5900 &9337 for pltf & moving party; William F. Abbott, Esq. 863-9337 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT FILKONEK, NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED. IT IS DENIED AS TO THE OTHER DEFENDANTS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO SEEK TO RENEW BASED ON ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. AT THIS POINT, PLAINTIFF LACKS SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT THE OTHER DEFENDANTS MISAPPROPRIATED OR ATTEMPTED TO MISAPPROPRIATE PLAINTIFF'S TRADE SECRETS. Plaintiff to prepare proposed form of order. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
